violations.description: PERSON IN CHARGE (4 pts): The Assistant Manager on duty during the course of the inspection was not able to present a Certified Manager's Certificate within the appropriate time.
SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): An inadequate amount of chlorine sanitizer was noted in the final rinse of the dish machine in the bar
INSECT RODENT ANIMAL CONTROL (3 pts): The back door to the kitchen has a large gap at the bottom which would allow the entrance of insects and/ or rodents.
HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): Paper towels noted not provided at the hand washing lavatory in the bar.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (2 pts): Cutting boards noted not in good repair
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Ice machine interior not properly maintained.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted being stored on the floor in walk-in cooler
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted being stored on the floor in walk-in cooler and walk-in freezer
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Walls and floors in the food prep area noted in need of cleaning.
REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): Exterior garbage and recyclables containers noted not covered with a tight fitting lids.
